jobs.title: FIRE + FoX on Tiny1M3M
jobs.summary: Adds two changes at once: a smarter way to keep track of word order, and a way to let the model gently ignore words from far back so it focuses more on what is nearby.

jobs.title: Moonlight Muon x QK-Norm
jobs.summary: Changes how the model is trained: a newer method (Muon) that nudges its settings in a smarter direction each step, plus a small stabilizer that keeps part of the attention math from growing too large and breaking training.

jobs.title: FIRE + U-Net sigmoid skips
jobs.summary: Adds shortcut wires connecting the early layers straight to the later layers in a U-shape, each with a soft on/off dial, so useful information can skip ahead. Already finished - its numbers are in the results below.
